comment: GUIDE PURPOSE: Performance & Optimization Standards regarding data hydration, prefetching, lazy loading, WebGL lifecycle management, touch gestures, and database selection query limits

rules.title: Hybrid Server Prefetching (SSR + SWR)
rules.requirement: Eliminate loading flickers and visual shifts on initial page paints
rules.mechanism: Fetch statistics and details server side inside page.tsx. Pass this payload as initialData props to the Client Component and set it as useSWR's fallbackData

rules.title: Server Side In Memory Caching
rules.requirement: Cache geocoded coordinates and database summaries to reduce API limits usage
rules.mechanism: Implement module level variables (cachedData, lastFetchTime) inside actions.ts to return cached datasets if elapsed time is under a 5 minute TTL

rules.title: Dynamic Imports & Code Splitting
rules.requirement: Avoid loading heavy javascript packages in initial paints
rules.mechanism: Utilize dynamic() imports with ssr: false to lazy load canvas rendering or analytics graphing components on demand, displaying placeholders during hydration

rules.title: Optimized Database Queries Selection
rules.requirement: Do not request unnecessary database columns
rules.mechanism: Define specific query fields (for example .select('id, name')) instead of wildcard matching to reduce payload size and JSON parsing bottlenecks

rules.title: WebGL Three.js Hydration & Lifecycle Guard
rules.requirement: Prevent state changes from triggering complete teardowns and blank re-initializations of WebGL scenes in React components
rules.mechanism: Store canvas interaction callbacks and element properties in stable React useRef closures. This lets the WebGL context initialize exactly once on mount, maintaining stable animation frames

rules.title: Rotated Coordinate World Transformations
rules.requirement: Focus 3D camera targets correctly on points on a rotating globe/mesh
rules.mechanism: Before executing camera fly to transitions, transform coordinate vectors dynamically by applying axis angle rotations matching the parent group's current rotation angle

rules.title: OSM Geocoding Server Fallbacks
rules.requirement: Avoid client side geocoding that triggers CORS blockages, adblock failures, or OpenStreetMap rate limits
rules.mechanism: Execute geocoding server side. Pre map popular target cities in a static configuration dictionary, and use a shared server side caching lookup for new addresses

rules.title: Mobile Touch Gesture Conflict Mitigation
rules.requirement: Prevent full bleed interactive components (like 3D WebGL canvases) from trapping touch gestures or blocking page scrolling on mobile
rules.mechanism: Coordinate overlay cards or sliding drawers to toggle z index or display dynamically during marker selections. Keep sidebar lists hidden during active point interactions to maximize swipe areas

rules.title: Resource Throttling on Mobile
rules.requirement: Conserve mobile battery life and prevent CPU/GPU overheating on small viewports
rules.mechanism: Cap window.devicePixelRatio at 2.0 inside rendering setups on mobile. Stop background loops or rotation cycles when components are out of view or overlays are active

rules.title: Responsive Asset and Image Optimization
rules.requirement: Prevent downloading desktop sized high resolution assets over limited mobile cellular connections
rules.mechanism: Utilize Next.js next/image or responsive HTML picture/img elements equipped with srcset and sizes attributes. Set explicit width/height or aspect ratio parameters to eliminate layout shifting

rules.title: High Latency Network Resilience
rules.requirement: Optimize user experience and minimize payload sizes on flaky mobile connections
rules.mechanism: Debounce input triggered searches by at least 400ms. Implement virtualized scrolling or pagination for lists exceeding 30 items. Fetch updates in the background via SWR, displaying cached local state immediately

rules.title: Mobile Rendering and Battery Conservation
rules.requirement: Reduce CPU/GPU cycles and throttle complex interactive calculations on low power devices
rules.mechanism: Disable heavy decorative animations, gradients, or backdrop filters on mobile viewport widths (below 768px). Halt requestAnimationFrame render loops when target components are out of view
